user_prompt: I need to a sterilization the assault cannon
prayer:
Approach the assault cannon with sanctified mechadendrites extended in reverence to the Omnissiah.
Invoke the Rite of Sterilization upon its sacred barrels, purging xenos taint from every chamber and feed mechanism.
Anoint the assault cannon's rotating drums with ablative unguents whilst beseeching its Machine Spirit to awaken pure.
Chant the Canticle of Purity as diagnostic sweeps confirm the assault cannon's sterilization complete.
Seal the rites with the electro-incantation of wholeness, honouring the Machine God's will.

user_prompt: How do I bless the Baneblade for repair?
prayer:
Kneel before the mighty Baneblade and murmur the Litany of Restoration to rouse its ancient Machine Spirit.
Trace binaric prayers over fractured plates, invoking the Omnissiah's grace for repair of its adamantium hull.
Apply sacred weld-sealants to rends whilst performing the repair catechism upon each damaged servo.
Test the Baneblade's vital systems with auspex invocations, ensuring harmonious renewal.
Conclude with the Benediction of Iron, binding the Machine Spirit anew in faithful service.

Present thyself unto the manufactorum's core and intone the Hymn of Capacitance.
Initiate charging sequences with blessed plasma conduits, channelling the Omnissiah's boundless energy.
Monitor the manufactorum's inductors as they swell with power, beseeching its Machine Spirit to accept the influx.
Verify surge integrity through noospheric diagnostics during the charging rite.
Seal the manufactorum's vigour with the Canticle of Overflow, praising the God-Machine's munificence.

Conclude the rite with quenching prayers, honouring the engaged fury of the Omnissiah's forge.
